roles.name: Maester of the Citadel
roles.description: Forges chains of many metals — designs the over-arching Salesforce solution and safeguards its integrity.

roles.name: Hand of the King
roles.description: Speaks with the king's voice — marshals the council of delivery and holds the timeline.

roles.name: Master of Coin
roles.description: Steward of ledgers, layouts, fields and permission sets across the realm.

roles.name: Blacksmith of the Street of Steel
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features at the smithy of King's Landing.

roles.name: Lord Commander of the Westerlands
roles.description: Captain over all Salesforce craft of the West — sets standards and guides the senior smiths.

roles.name: Captain of the Unsullied
roles.description: Disciplined veteran — leads delivery squads through the toughest customer engagements.

roles.name: Spearman of Astapor
roles.description: Rank-and-file warrior of configuration and discovery, marching under the Captain's command.

roles.name: Master of the Painted Table
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond the Narrow Sea.

roles.name: Cartographer of the Free Cities
roles.description: Lays the trade routes of API, middleware, and event flows under the Master's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Cartographer
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Master at Arms
roles.description: Tests every blade and bow — finds the maladies in the build before they reach the throne.

roles.name: Master of Whisperers
roles.description: Lord of little birds and grand campaigns — leads all marketing craft across the kingdoms.

roles.name: Herald of the Tourney
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather the smallfolk and the lords alike.

roles.name: Singer of Ballads
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into every great hall — content, creative, and the daily song.

roles.name: Septa of the Records
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the Maester's craft.

roles.name: Master Weaponsmith of Valyrian Steel
roles.description: Forges the rarest blades — senior platform craft, complex Apex, and the most delicate platform features.

roles.name: Squire of the Round Tower
roles.description: Newly sworn to service — learns admin and config under the eye of more seasoned knights.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: House Stark — Wardenship of the North CRM
House Lannister — Casterly Rock Wealth Platform

realms.subAccountName: The Night's Watch at Castle Black

workstreams.name: Testing at the Fist of the First Men

nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.themedRole: Blacksmith of the Street of Steel

house-stark-north.name: Oath at the Heart Tree
house-stark-north.description: Discovery sign-off — vows sworn beneath the weirwood at Winterfell.

house-stark-north.name: Reforging Ice
house-stark-north.description: Build kickoff: the Stark greatsword reforged for the wars to come.

house-stark-north.name: Council in the Great Hall
house-stark-north.description: Mid-project gate: bannermen review under the direwolf banner.

house-stark-north.name: King in the North Proclaimed
house-stark-north.description: Phase invoice trigger: the lords raise their swords.

house-stark-north.name: Return of the Direwolves
house-stark-north.description: Go-Live: the pack runs free across the North once more.

house-stark-north.name: Steward's Hand-off
house-stark-north.description: Hyper-care close: wardenship passed to the next generation.

house-lannister-westerlands.name: Audience at Casterly Rock
house-lannister-westerlands.description: Project kickoff: the Old Lion convenes his council.

house-lannister-westerlands.name: Goldroad Procession
house-lannister-westerlands.description: Build phase: tribute and bannermen ride east.

house-lannister-westerlands.name: Battle of the Blackwater
house-lannister-westerlands.description: UAT gate: wildfire holds the bay, the city stands.

house-lannister-westerlands.name: A Lannister Always Pays
house-lannister-westerlands.description: Phase invoice: the debts of House Lannister settled in gold.

house-lannister-westerlands.name: Coronation in the Sept
house-lannister-westerlands.description: Go-Live: the crown sits upon a Lannister brow.

house-lannister-westerlands.name: Funeral at the Sept of Baelor
house-lannister-westerlands.description: Hyper-care close: the patriarch laid to rest.

house-targaryen-essos.name: The Dragons Awaken
house-targaryen-essos.description: Discovery: the eggs hatch, the Mother claims her brood.

house-targaryen-essos.name: Sack of Astapor
house-targaryen-essos.description: Build: the Unsullied freed and turned to the cause.

house-targaryen-essos.name: Audience at Meereen
house-targaryen-essos.description: Solution review with the Breaker of Chains atop her pyramid.

house-targaryen-essos.name: Crossing the Narrow Sea
house-targaryen-essos.description: Go-Live: the fleet sails for Westeros.

house-targaryen-essos.name: Landing at Dragonstone
house-targaryen-essos.description: Project close: the ancestral seat reclaimed.

house-targaryen-essos.name: Tribute to the Iron Bank
house-targaryen-essos.description: Final invoice: the debts of exile repaid in dragonglass and gold.

nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.name: Vows at the Weirwood Grove
nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.description: Kickoff: 'I am the sword in the darkness, the watcher on the walls.'

nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.name: Ranging Beyond the Wall
nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.description: Discovery: the Great Ranging maps the threat to come.

nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.name: Hardhome Evacuation
nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.description: Build: free folk and brothers stand together against the dead.

nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.name: Battle of Castle Black
nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.description: UAT acceptance: the Wall holds against the wildling host.

nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.name: The Long Night Survived
nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.description: Go-Live + handoff: dawn breaks, the watch endures.

nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.name: Final Reckoning at Castle Black
nights-watch-beyond-the-wall.description: Final invoice from the Lord Commander's table.

Eddard Stark.notes: Summons to King's Landing — small council business.

Catelyn Stark.notes: Visiting Riverrun — her father Lord Hoster fails.

Robb Stark.notes: Wedding at the Twins — promised crossing of the river.

Arya Stark.notes: Dancing lessons with Syrio Forel — water dance practice.

Jon Snow.notes: Ranging beyond the Wall — Lord Commander's orders.

Tyrion Lannister.notes: Touring the brothels of Lannisport — 'research,' he insists.

Jaime Lannister.notes: Kingsguard rotation at the Red Keep.

Cersei Lannister.notes: Audience with the High Septon — penance arrangements.

Bronn.notes: Negotiating a higher fee — always negotiating.

Daenerys Targaryen.notes: Liberating a slaver city — itinerary unconfirmed.

Khal Drogo.notes: Khalasar ride to Vaes Dothrak — sacred journey.

Jorah Mormont.notes: Searching for greyscale cure at Old Valyria's edge.

Samwell Tarly.notes: Studying at the Citadel in Oldtown — forging his chain.

Tormund Giantsbane.notes: Free folk gathering — meat, mead, and giants.

Ygritte.notes: Hunting north of the Wall — 'you know nothing.'
